title: Anti Chunkbans
description: Simply stops you from getting kicked when entering a chunkban. Does not work on certain chunkbans after 26.1 update.
body:
# **Anti-Chunkban
# **

A lightweight client-side mod that prevents certain forms of NBT-based denial-of-service attacks, such as book bans / chunk bans, from making the game unplayable.

The mod safely handles oversized NBT data that would normally cause disconnects, freezes, or crashes when opening containers, loading items, or joining a server.

Features
Protection against book bans and similar oversized-NBT attacks
Client-side only
Lightweight and simple
Why use this mod?

Some servers or players may use items containing extremely large amounts of NBT data to cause lag, disconnects, or client instability. This mod helps keep your game playable by handling these cases more safely.
